---
title: "makie"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# makie

## 1D 

### scatter

```{julia}
using CairoMakie
fig = Figure(backgroundcolor=:white, size=(800, 300))
ax = Axis(fig[1,1], title="basic scatter", xlabel="X", ylabel="Y", 
          spinewidth=2, rightspinevisible=false)
x = 1:10
y = rand(10)
scatter!(ax, x, y, color=:blue, markersize=15)
save("figure.png", fig);
```

## 2D

### heat 

```{julia}
using CairoMakie

data = rand(10, 10)
fig = Figure() # 创建图形和坐标轴
ax = Axis(fig[1, 1])
hm = heatmap!(ax, data, colormap = :plasma, colorrange = (0, 1)) # 绘制热力图
cb = Colorbar(fig[1, 2], hm) # 添加颜色条
ax.xlabel = "Columns" # 设置轴标签和标题
ax.ylabel = "Rows"
ax.title = "Random Data Heatmap"
save("figure.png", fig)
```
